description: The DebugLocomotionSimulator component is used to draw Debug visuals for a virtual locomotion simulator that drives the procedural animation system.

fields.TrackPosition: Whether to keep track of this Debug locomotion's progressively moving position.
fields.State: The kind of locomotion this is debugging
fields.MovementSpeed: How fast the locomotion should be moving.
fields.AngularSpeed: How fast this locomotion should be turning.
fields.RotateDirection: Whether the locomotion should rotate its movement direction.
fields.OffsetRoot: Whether this locomotion should be offsetting from root as a starting position
